Interface IUnitConverter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members used for converting units.

[Guid("1F3FBCA9-6611-4567-88E4-E0FA8B6FB26D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUnitConverter

Methods

ConvertUnits(double, esriUnits, esriUnits)

Convert Esri units.

double ConvertUnits(double dValue, esriUnits inUnits, esriUnits outUnits)

Parameters

dValue double
inUnits esriUnits
outUnits esriUnits

Returns

double

EsriUnitsAsString(esriUnits, esriCaseAppearance, bool)

Convert Esri unit enumerations to strings.

bPlural bool
